message:
ui: fix slide overlap + add prev/next + auto-probe live MCP at boot

User feedback after iter 51's CSS fix:
  1. 'same problem with the initial slide show' — found 3 more
     var(--ink-1) typos beyond the first one (lines 1017, 1078, 1462
     in styles.css). All fixed; sweep confirms 0 remaining.
  2. 'we need include back and forth' — IntroSlideshow had only dots
     + pause; added prev (‹) and next (›) arrows that pause on click
     so the operator stays in control of the slide they navigated to.
  3. 'design seems overlap' on slides 3 + 4 — the .intro-show-art
     container had no explicit height, so during transitions the new
     SVG could bleed into the copy region beneath. Locked it at
     138 px (130 viewBox + 8 px padding) with overflow:hidden. Frame
     min-height bumped 296 → 340 for breathing room.
  4. 'i still see ○ DEMO · no live MCP' — Console only flipped to
     LIVE after operator clicked Test on Connect. Added an on-boot
     auto-probe of the default endpoint (rulake-mcp.ruv.io) — if it
     answers, RULakeActiveClient gets populated and the pill flips
     to ● LIVE automatically. Silent failure leaves it at ○ DEMO.

Live wire is gated on the Cloud Run TLS cert provisioning (still in
flight as of this commit; ~5-15 min for Let's Encrypt). Once the
cert lands, the boot probe will succeed transparently for visitors.
